comment: Corpus for the A6.2 Python behavioral tier (run-python.mjs). Each case is generated, its `platform: python` (FastAPI) deployable booted against a real Postgres (DATABASE_URL), and its emitted `test e2e` api suite HTTP-dispatched at the booted server. Unlike the node tier (corpus.json, in-process PGlite + app.fetch), Python has no in-process Postgres, so this needs a real DB — see docs/plans/a6.2-behavioral-tier-second-backend.md.
